title: Discharge Delay Flags Demo
source: Curated synthetic sample data in sample_data/. No PHI or real patient data.

metric_glossary.meaning: Synthetic admissions in the selected case window.
Share of encounters with at least one out-of-bounds operational delay signal.
Number of grouped action signals a shift huddle needs to review.
Estimated excess bed-hours above expected operating thresholds.
How much patient-level evidence is compressed into shift-level signals.
